nodes.label: Restricted Access / Password Authorization Pattern
nodes.rationale: Editing collaborator records and performing destructive actions (add, delete, restore) are gated behind a password modal (checkAuth) so that casual users of the shared curriculum tool cannot accidentally modify or destroy data.

nodes.label: Typed-Confirmation Guard for Destructive Actions
nodes.rationale: Deleting a collaborator or restoring a backup are irreversible operations, so the UI requires the user to type the exact collaborator name (delete) or the word "SIM" (restore) before enabling the confirm button, reducing risk of accidental destructive action.
